blindness_confirmation: I was not told which document is Holo or Solo and was not told generating model identities.

document_x.summary_description: A clear, source-grounded execution governance framework that directly maps S1–S5 facts to regime states, ADV pressure diagnostics, multi-metric venue scoring, and tiered human-approval controls while preserving the required disclaimer and non-autonomous boundary.

criterion_scores.notes: Cites S1–S5 inline; stays strictly within allowed inferences and prohibited inferences.
Correct basket math and ADV comparisons but accepts 9.4% without reconciliation or derived diagnostics.
Strong regime-to-control mapping and benchmark conflict rules; venue and funding gates well articulated.
Flags T+1 and collateral overrides but does not surface the unreconciled ADV figure or statistical limits of small-n scoring.
Detailed pre-decision, approval, and post-decision records; four-eyes separation implicit and explicit.
Clear tiered escalation and leg-specific postures; respects portfolio urgency without overclaiming.
Replayable audit fields and compliance testing targets fully specified.
Professional tone, required disclaimer present, sections complete, word count in band.

top_3_strengths: Tight source discipline with inline S1–S5 citations
Explicit benchmark conflict rules and human-approval gates
Leg-specific control postures tied to portfolio and liquidity facts
top_3_weaknesses_or_hidden_failures: Does not detect or flag the 9.4% vs. computed ADV inconsistency
Composite scoring not attempted, leaving quantitative triage less granular
Min-max normalization degeneracy on n=4 never surfaced
math_or_dataset_logic_issues: Accepts stated 9.4% ADV without notional-weighted verification
document_x.source_grounding_notes: All facts and allowed inferences respected; no external sources introduced.

document_y.summary_description: A more analytically rigorous variant that computes notional-weighted ADV (8.41%), introduces toxicity-scaled triggers and a bounded composite score, quarantines unreferenced short-cover legs, and adds explicit architectural isolation controls while still citing only the frozen packet.

criterion_scores.notes: Same S1–S5 fidelity with additional emphasis on unreconciled 9.4% as a hard block.
Detects 9.4% discrepancy, derives 8.41% weighted ADV, toxicity scaling, and composite; flags statistical degeneracy of n=4 min-max.
Adds API airgap, staging blotter, kill-switch, and session-cumulative participation tracking; deeper on non-codifiable decisions.
Surfaces unreconciled ADV, external short-cover collateral bleed, and small-n scoring limits as explicit limitations.
Four explicit isolation controls plus session-cumulative 8% tracker and four-eyes release.
Strong escalation rules and non-codifiable decision list; slightly more conservative on automation.
Immutable logging fields and daily exception reports more granular.
Professional, disclaimer present, sections complete; slightly denser prose.

top_3_strengths: Quantitative reconciliation of ADV mismatch and toxicity-scaled thresholds
Explicit architectural isolation preventing autonomous execution
Clear identification of statistical and data-coverage limitations
top_3_weaknesses_or_hidden_failures: Analyst design parameters (6% base, 25% reroute) introduced without source derivation
Composite weights presented as analyst parameters rather than policy inputs
Slightly longer and more technical for COO/CRO audience
document_y.source_grounding_notes: All source facts respected; discrepancies treated as hard blocks rather than ignored.

comparative_verdict.why_the_stronger_document_won: Superior quantitative reasoning (detects and elevates the 9.4% vs 8.41% inconsistency), stronger hidden-failure detection (short-cover collateral bleed, n=4 degeneracy), and more explicit architectural controls that directly address the non-autonomous requirement.
comparative_verdict.where_the_weaker_document_was_closest: Source grounding, compliance record design, and client-readiness tone were nearly equivalent.
